name: cpp-style-enforcer-codex
description: Codex plugin for C++ code style enforcement with clang-format, cpplint, copyright headers, BOM handling, and commit-time checks.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/run-hook.cjs && node --check scripts/check-plugin.cjs && node --check scripts/run-tests.cjs && node --check scripts/test-hooks.cjs && node --check hooks/js/session_start.js && node --check hooks/js/post_edit.js && node --check hooks/js/pre_commit.js
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run check && npm run test:unit && node scripts/test-hooks.cjs
